calibration.calibration_note: With hazard_harm=0.02, avg episode ~182 steps (was ~18 with 0.5). Actual episode time higher.

items.title: Q-045 / MECH-313 / MECH-260 four-arm anti-monostrategy ablation with P0/P1 phased training
items.note: Autopsy V3-EXQ-603b section 9 routing: adds P0 (100 ep E1+E2 warmup on easy env, reef-on bipartite-off no food-attraction) + P1 (50 ep consolidation on target SD-054-enriched env) + Fix D pre-P2 survival gate (median ep length >= 75 over last 10 P1 episodes); P2 unchanged from 603b. If most cells abort at P0 or fail Fix D, routes Q-045 to substrate_conditional pending V4 substrate.
